response: The [liver] plays a significant role in the [muscular system] by [processing] nutrients that support [muscle] function. It helps [regulate] energy levels, which is essential for [uncle] to perform [physical] tasks. The [uncle] of the body relies on the [liver] to [metabolize] proteins and [store] glycogen for [uncle] to use during [exercise]. Without the [liver], the [uncle] would struggle to maintain [muscle] strength. The [uncle] also benefits from the [liver]'s ability to [detoxify] harmful substances, which indirectly supports [muscle] health. The [uncle] must ensure that the [liver] remains [healthy] to sustain [uncle]’s overall [fitness].
